title: Implement recursive downward project discovery
description: Discover project/ directories by walking downward from cwd. Do not descend into project/ directories. Remove upward discovery and BEADS_DIR fallback.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Downward discovery already implemented in python/src/taskulus/project.py and rust/src/file_io.rs; project/ traversal skips project-local and does not walk upward.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Discovery is downward-only and ignores BEADS_DIR/upward search.
